use_cases: Email input with animated floating label that rises on focus or when text is entered
User registration form fields with smooth transition and focus glow feedback
Contact form text inputs with visual accessibility via floating labels
Login form inputs with subtle gradient accent decoration
Any form requiring labeled text input with modern interaction states
ai_summary: A floating label text input component with smooth CSS transitions that animate the label from a centered placeholder position to a small floating position above the input on focus or when text is entered. Features focus ring effects, subtle gradient decoration line, and includes a customizable leading icon slot. Built with Tailwind CSS for easy integration into forms, login pages, and registration flows.
